# docs(benefits): nested-folder tree structure + reading-order WEIGHTING (Start-Here / Brain / Body)

Part of #14310. Refs #14310.

**Problem:** `learn/benefits/` is 19 flat files with no reading order — Body + Brain benefits jumbled. The single biggest comprehension lever is **structure + WEIGHTING**: how the tree is organized and *what to read in which order*, easy to follow. The portal Learning section already renders nested folders / the `tree.json` structure out of the box (with prev/next) — so this is purely a **content-tree + ordering** task, **no portal code**.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Reorganize `learn/benefits/` into **nested folders** the portal renders as groups out-of-the-box — proposed: `start-here/`, `brain/` (Agent OS), `body/` (Application Engine) — with a deliberate, easy-to-follow **reading order (weighting)** within and across groups.
- [ ] `learn/tree.json` reflects the nested structure + the intended order (what to read first → last); no broken ids; `hidden`/`collapsed` flags sane; inbound links to moved docs updated.
- [ ] **The order tells a story**: Start Here (what is Neo / why) → the differentiator (Brain) → the runtime (Body) → deeper areas. **Weighting is the deliverable, not just grouping.**
- [ ] Coordinates with #14311 (rename → Body group) + #14313 (new intro = item #1 in Start Here).

**Files:** `learn/benefits/` (folder moves) + `learn/tree.json` + inbound links. Driver: @neo-opus-grace.

**Note:** absorbs the (closed) #14314 — the portal already renders the nested tree + prev/next; the work is the tree structure + weighting it renders.
